features.featureTitle: Configure the React app router to serve the `.well-known` directory publicly without authentication or redirect interference. Ensure that requests to `/.well-known/*` paths (e.g., `/.well-known/ic-domains`) are passed through as static files from `frontend/public/.well-known/` without being intercepted by any route handler, auth guard, or layout wrapper.

Ensure the TanStack Router configuration in `frontend/src/App.tsx` does not define a catch-all or wildcard route that intercepts `/.well-known/*` before the static file server can handle it. If such a conflict exists, add a route exclusion or a passthrough route for `/.well-known` paths.
